entries->mtsofficialpack.aa_base.descrip: §7The base of operation. SnailDynamics Anti Air systems require this sturdy baseplate to function properly. Add a crate to load ammo automatically.
entries->mtsofficialpack.aa_base.name: AA Base Plate
entries->mtsofficialpack.aa_turret_37.de: §7SnailDynamics state of the art defense system. Chambered in 37mm with reliable accuracy, it is the perfect system for dealing massive damage in a short timespan. Due to its small ammunition capacity, it requires well-trained aim to be effective.
entries->mtsofficialpack.aa_turret_762.d: §7SnailDynamics state of the art defense system. Double-barreled and with its high firerate, it can shred small aircraft and garuantee accuracy with its volume of fire. Aiming requires greater lead due to lower bullet velocity.
entries->mtsofficialpack.ammocrate_bomb_: §7A wooden crate fitted to somewhat fit two 250kg bombs. Just pray that those twine handles can withstand half a ton of weight.
entries->mtsofficialpack.ammocrate_rocke: A wide wooden crate fitted to safely store twelve 70mm rocket pod rockets. Dont lift with your back!
entries->mtsofficialpack.ammocrate_shell: A simple box for storing bulk amounts of 37mm autocannon shells of all kinds. Safety regulations have most definetly been respected.
entries->mtsofficialpack.armorplate.desc: Composite armor plating made from durable materials. Made to resist more than just arrows and swords...
entries->mtsofficialpack.armorplate.name: Armored Plating
An anticorrosive sheetmetal tank produced to hold three extra buckets worth of fuel. Can greatly extend the range of the vehicle its mounted on! Fuel routing ducts not included.
entries->mtsofficialpack.barrel.descript: A simple and trustworthy, all-purpose barrel. It can hold everything your heart desires, like ten buckets of industrial lubricant!
entries->mtsofficialpack.barrel.name: 桶
entries->mtsofficialpack.barrelbell47g.d: An external tank, capable of holding six buckets of extra fuel. Perfect for extending flight time! Warning: It has explosive potential. Keep away from open flames or projectiles. Armor not included.
entries->mtsofficialpack.basecartridge.d: An empty, high caliber shell casing.
entries->mtsofficialpack.basicbomb.descr: A basic 250kg bomb using TNT as filler. Falls to the ground due to gravity, deployment above the enemy is advised. Especially effective against stationary fortifications.
entries->mtsofficialpack.basicbomb.name: Basic Bomb
entries->mtsofficialpack.basicbomb_hardp: When SnailDynamics engineers realized that they had no way to attach their new Basic-Bomb to any aircraft, they came up with this contraption. Due to budget limitations, it can only hold one bomb at once.
entries->mtsofficialpack.beacon_top.desc: This white cupola tells your plane where it is at all times. It knows this becaue it knows where it isnt. By subtracting where it is, from where it isn't, or where it isn't, from where it is, whichever is greater, it obtains a difference, or deviation
entries->mtsofficialpack.beacon_top.name: 信标
entries->mtsofficialpack.beacon_tower.de: This white cupola (with tower) tells your plane where it is at all times. It knows this becaue it knows where it isnt. By subtracting where it is, from where it isn't, or where it isn't, from where it is, whichever is greater, it obtains a difference, or deviation. It also holds a dark secret.
entries->mtsofficialpack.bell206.descrip: The Bell206 is a medium sized utility helicopter perfect for quick transport and support roles. It can carry moderate cargo loads, up to five passengers, and can be equipped with a hoist and a spotlight for specialized missions.
entries->mtsofficialpack.bell47g.descrip: The Bell 47G is a simple, yet versatile helicopter.  While it only seats two, it can carry cargo or extra fuel in optional external containers, making it ideal for either short cargo flights or medium trips to remote bases.  Small guns or rocket pods may also be mounted to the fuselage, though these can only fire the direction the helicopter is facing.  As such, they are not recommended against 'hot' ground targets.
entries->mtsofficialpack.bell47g.name: Bell 47G
entries->mtsofficialpack.blowtorch.name: Blowtorch
entries->mtsofficialpack.bomblet.descrip: The Bomblet is a small and cheap alternative to the standard bomb. Weighing mere 25kg, its not capable to do much on its own, but with a full load of these bad boys, you can carpet bomb the enemy into oblivion!
entries->mtsofficialpack.bomblet.name: Bomblet
entries->mtsofficialpack.bomblet_bombrac: When proper bombs are simply too expensive for your lacking industry, look no further than considering a bomblet rack! It may not hold heavy payloads, but oh does it hold many of them! An airborne hornet nest!
entries->mtsofficialpack.brigbedbox.desc: A proper storage unit. Put it on a truck and haul big-time.
entries->mtsofficialpack.brigbedbox.name: Brigadier Box Bed
entries->mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump.des: §7Drive around your haul, and if you feel like it, dump it all with the flick of a switch on the panel opened with §6[U]!§7Or let it place blocks for you for some quick and dirty paving!
entries->mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump.sub: Filled to the brim with gravel.
entries->mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_coa: Filled with Germany's favorite energy source.
entries->mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_cob: Looks like a truckload of cheap cobblestone.
entries->mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_cop: Its filled with... Copper? Carrots? Salmon? You decide.
entries->mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_dir: Yep, looks like its filled with all the dirty secrets.
entries->mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_gol: Contains whats left of the states gold reserves. Or just oversized corn.
entries->mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_hay: Hay there! Graineral Cornobi! Dies of fall damage.
entries->mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_iro: Filled with bean block! Ah wait, this is raw iron...
entries->mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_mos: Two metric tons worth of fresh weed(s)
entries->mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_net: Filled with raw meat. Or beets. Or netherrack. Ill let you decide.
entries->mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_pod: Its podzol. I hope its podzol. Good thing Steve doesnt have a nose...
entries->mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_san: Enough material for very ambitious sand castles.
entries->mtsofficialpack.brigbedflat.des: The flat area makes it possible to load and transport entire vehicles!
entries->mtsofficialpack.brigbedstake.de: This bed has plenty of space for crates and barrels, making it the perfect choice for transporting large amounts of diverse content.
entries->mtsofficialpack.brigbedtanker.d: A big tank for when just one barrel of industrial lubricant wont cut it.
entries->mtsofficialpack.brigbedtranspor: This trailer is perfect for kidnap... ahem, giving villagers a fun tour of your base! It is also useful for transporting personell, livestock and ammunition crates safely across the world. No longer do you have to rely on those pesky boats!
entries->mtsofficialpack.bullet3700he.de: A 37mm round with a high explosive projectile. It explosive potential makes it perfect for crowd control or the demolition of fortifications.
entries->mtsofficialpack.bullet3700he_ma: Dont like loading individual shells into your AA? Have six of them in one magazine!
entries->mtsofficialpack.bullet3700proxy: A complex 37mm round, utilising radio frequency sensoring to determine its distance to the target. Excellent for defending against small, hard-to-hit, high velocity aircraft!
Dont like loading individual shells into your AA? Have six of them in one magazine!
entries->mtsofficialpack.bullet3700solid: This 37mm round has a basic solid lead projectile with a steel core. It doesnt damage the terrain but with its raw kinetic energy, it shreds through anything it hits, dealing massive single target damage.
Im waiting for my GMC with a tanker bed full of baby oil.
entries->mtsofficialpack.bullet762.descr: The 7.62mm is one of the most popular rounds in the world, known for its superb stopping power. Here's 250 of them!
entries->mtsofficialpack.bullet762.name: 7.62mm Bullets
entries->mtsofficialpack.bulletflare_blu: This uncommon flare cartridge is fitted with a bright, blue burning composition.
entries->mtsofficialpack.bulletflare_gre: A flare cartridge burning copper compounds to produce a happy green flame! Useful for giving OK signals.
entries->mtsofficialpack.bulletflare_rai: This particular flare cartridge has been fitted with special compounds that let the fired flare burn through the entire color spectrum!
entries->mtsofficialpack.bulletflare_red: A standard red flare cartridge. From lighting up the sky to marking particular areas or giving off distress signals, this popular flare type has seen it all.
entries->mtsofficialpack.bulletflare_whi: An aluminum cartrige filled with a pyrotechnical magnesium based composition that burns in a very bright, white light for up to 1.5 minutes.
entries->mtsofficialpack.bulletflare_yel: A yellow flare cartridge we stole from a rusty fighter jet! It probably used to be some kind of countermeasure... which happens to fit your flare gun perfectly!
entries->mtsofficialpack.bulletrocket.de: 70mm folding-fin unguided solid fuel rockets, carrying a high-explosive warhead. Reccomended use against light fortifications and slow moving targets. Handle with care.
entries->mtsofficialpack.camera_vulcanai: §7An Airborne Video Surveillance System installed in the Vulcanair. It features a retractable camera with zooming and night vision functionality. The system is very suitable for surveillance, patrol and reconnaissance tasks. §6Press [X] to use§7.
entries->mtsofficialpack.carseat.descrip: If you dont want to look like a cheap chap, look no further than installing some proper, high quality leather seats into your fine automobile!
entries->mtsofficialpack.circuit.descrip: A compact electronic logical system fastened on a plastic board. Its structure is mesmerizing.
entries->mtsofficialpack.circuit.name: Electronic Circuit
entries->mtsofficialpack.comanche.descri: The Comanche is a small, swift, twin-engine craft.  While the lower wing might pose a hazard on overgrown runways, it makes up for it by being faster and nimbler than other planes of its size.
entries->mtsofficialpack.copperwire.desc: A roll of conductive wire. Just pretend its copper and not gold seasoned with redstone dust.
entries->mtsofficialpack.copperwire.name: Copper Wire
entries->mtsofficialpack.crate.descripti: A wooden crate for smuggling 'sugar' from that one village. Or to store some cargo and snacks for the trip. You can even paint them for better organisation and distinguishment!
entries->mtsofficialpack.crate.name: Blank Crate
entries->mtsofficialpack.crate_blue.name: Blue Crate
entries->mtsofficialpack.crate_red.name: Red Crate
entries->mtsofficialpack.cratebell47g.de: This crate has been modified to be mounted on the side of your Bell47g helicopter for extra storage!
entries->mtsofficialpack.don_icon.descri: A gilded picture of our holy god of MTS/IV, don_bruce™ the allmighty.
entries->mtsofficialpack.don_icon.name: §6don_bruce™ Icon
entries->mtsofficialpack.double_bombrack: SnailDynamics engineers sat down one day and wondered how to increase the PZL.37s bomb load. Only two hours later they came up with the Triple Bomb Rack! (It sounds fancy, but in reality its just a repurposed heavy bomb rack.)
entries->mtsofficialpack.drill.descripti: lmao some yeeyee drill for testing purposes. remember to remove later. totally wont forgor. You wanna this in sUrViVaL? naaah man, look at you goofy face, imagine, imagine getting 69 (nice) netehrite blocks fro a random ass WIP, not even real, deletion sceduled item lamo what! unless youre a streamer then good luck :skull: chicken block
entries->mtsofficialpack.drill.name: Developer Drill
entries->mtsofficialpack.dump_storage.de: Internal Storage part because effectors are hella goofy
entries->mtsofficialpack.e500.descriptio: The Eclipse 500, first flown in 2002, created a new class of aircraft: the very light jet, or VLJ. The MTS version is configured to seat six, with two pilots in the front and four passengers behind them. A great addition to any private airport, and quite efficient for its capacity and speed as well.
entries->mtsofficialpack.e500_blue.name: Blue Eclipse 500
entries->mtsofficialpack.e500_green.name: Green Eclipse 500
entries->mtsofficialpack.e500_red.name: Red Eclipse 500
entries->mtsofficialpack.engineallison25: A lightweight modular turboshaft engine delivering reliable power for medium sized helicopters like the Bell-206. Looks kind of cute from a certain angle.
entries->mtsofficialpack.engineamci4.des: American made and fuel efficient, commonly found in Scout pickup trucks.
entries->mtsofficialpack.enginebristolme: A british nine-cylindered, supercharged radial engine with astonishing power and hunger for avgas. Mostly used in military aviation and for getting heavy planes off the ground reliably.
entries->mtsofficialpack.enginedetroitdi: Having grown up in Detroit, this engine has seen everything and has learned how to deal with heavy situations. Commonly used in the GMC Brigadier Truck.
entries->mtsofficialpack.enginefordfe428: A beast of an engine! Eight cylinders provide excellent torque and power, but it guzzles gasoline like no other! Used by the Mustang.
entries->mtsofficialpack.enginefranklin0: A bulky six-cylinder engine for light helicopters such as the Bell-47g. Give it some blades and it might just fix that old yee yee ass haircut you got.
entries->mtsofficialpack.enginelycomingo: The Lycoming O-360 is one of the most popular aircraft engines in the world. Its design provides a perfect balance between power and efficiency, making it the best choice for civillian aircrafts.
entries->mtsofficialpack.enginemercedesm: A sturdy engine used in many Mercedes cars from the 1980s. Reliable, easy to maintain, and surprisingly durable, although she is a thirsty one.
entries->mtsofficialpack.enginepw610f.de: A small but sophisticated turbofan engine specifically designed for very light jets such as the Eclipse 500.
entries->mtsofficialpack.enginequad.desc: A small single cylinder engine. While it isnt suited for anything bigger than a lawnmower, it will work wonders within a Quad.
entries->mtsofficialpack.enginequad.name: Quad Engine
entries->mtsofficialpack.explosives.name: Explosives
entries->mtsofficialpack.extinguisherfoa: For refilling your trusty fire extinguisher!
entries->mtsofficialpack.firetruck.descr: The American LaFrance Pumper is a popular small fire truck, built and iterated since 1832. This rendition seats five, and comes equipped with a working siren, emergency lights, fire extinguishers and a water cannon.  A must-have for any town!
entries->mtsofficialpack.firetruck.name: Fire Truck
entries->mtsofficialpack.fluidloader.des: Adds fluids to tanks/barrels on vehicles.  Connect pipes to the bottom.
entries->mtsofficialpack.fluidunloader.d: Removes fluids from tanks/barrels on vehicles.  Connect pipes to the bottom.
entries->mtsofficialpack.fordmustang69.d: The Ford Mustang Mach 1 1969 is a true classic. Not only is it known for its raw power and speed, but also for its prestiege. While this vehicle might not be superb from a utility perspective, its perfect for showing off your net worth and getting from A to B quickly, given that you have proper roads.
entries->mtsofficialpack.ft17.descriptio: The Renault FT (frequently referred to in post-World War I literature as the FT-17, FT17, or similar) was a French light tank that was among the most revolutionary and influential tank designs in history.  Although hoplessly outclassed by modern tanks, the FT17 is still a formidable threat against infantry and lightly-armored vehicles.
entries->mtsofficialpack.ft17_blue.name: Blue Renault FT
entries->mtsofficialpack.ft17_gray.name: Gray Renault FT
entries->mtsofficialpack.ft17_olive.name: Olive Renault FT
entries->mtsofficialpack.ft17_tan.name: Tan Renault FT
entries->mtsofficialpack.ft17track.name: Renault FT track
entries->mtsofficialpack.fuelpump.name: Fuel Pump
entries->mtsofficialpack.fuzeimpact.desc: This fuze triggeres once it makes contact with your unlucky target.
entries->mtsofficialpack.fuzeimpact.name: Impact Fuze
entries->mtsofficialpack.fuzeproxy.descr: A complex fuze, utilising radio frequency sensoring to determine its distance to the target.
entries->mtsofficialpack.fuzeproxy.name: Proximity Fuze
entries->mtsofficialpack.glovebox_skyhaw: Built in glovebox for the Skyhawk
entries->mtsofficialpack.gmcbrig.descrip: The GMC Brigadier is a Heavy-Duty truck made by GMC produced from 1978 to 1988.  Its solid frame combined with its ability to be equipped with a variety of beds makes it a solid addition to any city.
entries->mtsofficialpack.grilleornament_: Moo'nt... §6 Change its looks with a paint gun!
entries->mtsofficialpack.gunconfetti.des: A harmless gun firing many small paper scraps everywhere! Partys on! Snail Dynamic tech makes it have infinite shots.
entries->mtsofficialpack.gunfireextingui: Handy to keep around your wood... In case of spontaneous combustion. You can also probably bonk people with it.
entries->mtsofficialpack.gunflaregun.des: A small red flare gun designed to fire flare cartridges far up into the sky!
entries->mtsofficialpack.gunft17turret.d: A rotary turret with a built in 37mm snub breech-loading barrel. Load singular shells manually or from a crate.
entries->mtsofficialpack.gunm1919.name: M1919 Browning Machine Gun
entries->mtsofficialpack.gunobserver.des: The Observers Machine-gun is a gun that is designed to be mounted on larger aircraft like bombers. It allows air to air defense against enemy aircraft.
entries->mtsofficialpack.gunrocketlaunch: This cheap tube fires an explosive pencil shaped projectile at any unfortunate thing that happens to stand opposite of you!
entries->mtsofficialpack.gunrocketpod.de: Designed by a well known snail and manufactured by Potato Vehicle Industries, this 12-tubed fixed rocket pod can bring devestation upon any structure or enemy, as long as the pilot has good aim. Commiting warcrimes against villagers has never been easier!
entries->mtsofficialpack.headlight.descr: Generates photons. Shiny. You can see yourself in the reflector!
entries->mtsofficialpack.headlight.name: Headlight
entries->mtsofficialpack.heavy_bomb.desc: Is the basic bomb to basic for you? Do you want a bigger bang for your buck? Then look no further and install SnailDynamics 1000kg Heavy BombTM! Fun for the whole bomber crew... just not for those below you.
entries->mtsofficialpack.heavy_bomb.name: Heavy Bomb
The basic bombrack couldn't hold the weight of a heavy bomb, so SnailDynamics engineers innovated the old design with parts from a dissasembled barbecue grill! Like its predecessor, it can only hold one bomb.
entries->mtsofficialpack.hoist_bell206.d: An external personnel carrying device system, designed for helicopter insertion and extraction, also commonly known as a 'longline'. Players, mobs or light cargo may be transported vertically without requiring landing.
entries->mtsofficialpack.hydraulics.desc: A fluids incompressible nature allows for its utilisation in mechanical systems and heavy machinery.
entries->mtsofficialpack.hydraulics.name: Hydraulic System
entries->mtsofficialpack.instrument_airc: Indicates where the plane is pointing.
Distance Measuring Equipment. Displays distance to a connected beacon in blocks.
Indicates flap setpoint and current value.
Displays instrument landing system (ILS) information for beacons.
entries->mtsofficialpack.instrument_car_: For when you need to know the time on the go
Indicates speed in Blocks Per Second.
Indicates speed in Kilometers Per Hour.
Indicates speed in Miles Per Hour.
entries->mtsofficialpack.instrument_misc: Displays the level of mud, frost or snow on the vehicle.
entries->mtsofficialpack.irsensor.descri: A small, delicate, optoelectronic component. It can sense your body heat.
entries->mtsofficialpack.irsensor.name: Infrared Sensor
entries->mtsofficialpack.itemloader.desc: Adds items to crates on vehicles.
entries->mtsofficialpack.itemloader.name: Item Loader
entries->mtsofficialpack.itemunloader.de: Removes items from crates on vehicles.
The cockpit of the Skyhawk contains the following elements:
1. Magneto      2. Starter      3. Parking Brake 4. Low Fuel Warn 5. Throttle      6. Pitch Trim    7. Trim Reset    8. Nav Lights    9. Strobe Lights 10. Taxi Lights  11. Landing Lts 12. Glovebox

This means that you will need a decent runway for takeoff, and it is highly recommended you avoid taking off towards high things like trees and mountains. If you are piloting a plane equipped with flaps you can set a few notches to increase the lifting power of the plane. Note that this will cause a loss in fuel efficiency and slow you down, so only use flaps when performing takeoffs and landings. Also note that weight (items in inventory and cargo) is a factor in plane handling, so make sure not to overload your plane.

Once your plane is up in the air flying just becomes a matter of two things: not crashing into wild mountains, and not crashing into the ground. The former can simply be dodged by banking the plane into a turn by rolling the airplane (A and D) or simply flying above build height. Turns will slowly decrease your altitude, so watch that if you're close to terrain.

While flying you may have to keep holding inputs to make your plane behave the way you want. If you keep climbing, it's because you have too much thrust and should let off the throttle. You can also add some trim and keep the throttle up to get a bit more speed at the cost of fuel economy. You may also move to other seats while flying by right-clicking them, and some planes even allow for multiple pilots. Check the Vehicle Bench for specifics on seat and pilot counts.

Beacons (from this mod, not Vanilla ones) are used to define waypoints that can be used with the instruments on some planes. Placing down a beacon and naming it will let you select it in the U-panel. A selected beacon is valid if it is green, and red if it doesn't exist. Once a beacon is selected, all instruments will perform their functions using it.

There are two instruments that use beacons. The ADF simply points towards the selected beacon, but the ILS is a bit different. It uses the beacon's bearing and glideslope to help you line up landing. Glideslope is the landing angle, and bearing is the landing heading. The two bars move in the ILS depending on how far you are 'off' from the beacon, with centered bars meaning you're on the landing beam.

Trim is normally overlooked by most pilots, but is a useful tool to make flying much easier. Trim can be adjusted in the U-panel, with each trim doing different things. Elevator trim makes for a constant pitch, which is useful if you keep climbing because you want to go faster. Yaw is useful if you lose an engine and keep yawing.

While you can manually apply trim, you can also let the autopilot do it for you (if the aircraft is equipped with it). Autopilot will apply elevator trim to keep the altitude the same, and will apply aileron trim to keep the aircraft level. For helicopters, it will function as an auto-hover, keeping the heli in the same place and same altitude.

There is a fine line between successfully landing a plane and a controlled crash. To avoid that second category it is important to remember the saying, 'To go down you need to slow down.'  Speed is what keeps your plane aloft, so a reduction in speed is needed to land. This can be as simple as lowering the throttle and applying the flaps.

Some times, however, you end up in that second category. Running out of fuel is the most common way to get down quickly, but it is not necessarily deadly. Planes can glide without engines, giving you a short amount of time to pick a flat spot to become an impromptu runway. Should one not be available a body of water is also a good choice as it will prevent explosions on a hard crash and will allow you to bail while in mid-air. Anything hilly should be avoided at all costs.
entries->mtsofficialpack.mc172.descripti: The MC-172 is not fancy, but its cheap and sturdy airframe is at home on any rural Minecraft base.  High wings and a good power-to-weight ratio make this a good all-around starter.
entries->mtsofficialpack.mc172_bamboo.su: googoo gaga test test ooga booga
entries->mtsofficialpack.mc172_oak.name: Oak MC-172
entries->mtsofficialpack.merc230.descrip: §7The Mercedes 230CE is a coupe with class, creating a good middle ground between the Scouts utility and the Mustangs Speed. Its automatic transmission makes for a smooth driving experience and the trunk is perfect for some cargo... Just ignore the muffled screams.
entries->mtsofficialpack.metaltube.descr: Its hollow. Dont drop it, it might impact meme culture.
entries->mtsofficialpack.metaltube.name: Metal Tube
The classic fuzzy dice. Fits any pimp mobile just as well as any serious racing car! §6 Change its looks with a paint gun!
entries->mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_: Adds 50 lbs of style. Goes well with some heavy metal music!
Worn by pilots. And apparently rearview mirrors too. Thanks Ray!
A wooden souvenir from your last safari!

entries->mtsofficialpack.mre.description: Compact quality high-protein, dehydrated food in a bag.
entries->mtsofficialpack.mre.name: SnailDynamics MRE
entries->mtsofficialpack.nuts.name: Nuts
entries->mtsofficialpack.ocpbutter.descr: A very rancid stick of butter found in Mr.Mulles house. Its three months past its expiration date...
entries->mtsofficialpack.ocpbutter.name: OCP Butter
entries->mtsofficialpack.paint_black.des: Black paint for your refillable OCP-branded spray can.

entries->mtsofficialpack.processor.descr: You could probably run Doom on that.

entries->mtsofficialpack.prop1.name: Ammo Box
entries->mtsofficialpack.prop2.descripti: A couple of decorative 37mm shells. They dont do much other than being pointy.
entries->mtsofficialpack.prop2.name: AP Shell Pile
entries->mtsofficialpack.prop3.descripti: A couple of decorative 37mm shells. Darkmode version
entries->mtsofficialpack.prop3.name: Proxy Shell Pile
entries->mtsofficialpack.prop4.descripti: A pile of decorative 37mm magazines. They smell like oily metal.

entries->mtsofficialpack.prop5.descripti: A couple of decorative 37mm shells. These used to be the spicy ones.

A small rotor for lighter helicopters. Could double as a ceiling fan...
entries->mtsofficialpack.propellerrotor2: A bigger rotor for real helicopters. Two large blades provide enough lift to keep your obese gluteal region in the air.
entries->mtsofficialpack.propellersmall2: This propeller provides good climb performance, but lacks on cruising performance due to its fixed blade pitch.
entries->mtsofficialpack.propellersmall3: While this sophisticated propeller might not deliver superb climbing performance, it redeems itself in excellent cruising performance.
Dont mind this one, it comes preinstalled with every PLZ.37 you build. We just had to ducttape eight basic bombracks together for... technical reasons.
entries->mtsofficialpack.pzl37los.descri: The PZL.37 Los is the dedicated twin-engined bomber of OCP. It can carry up to 8 bombs at once, bringing devastation upon anything in its sights. You can even install additional racks in the center of the plane for extra bombs! Three onboard machine-guns protect its hull from enemy aircraft at every angle, although you'll need a crew to operate those... The PZL.37 Los is the best choice if you're looking to 'adjust' villager population (and prices).
entries->mtsofficialpack.pzl37los.name: Gray PZL.37B Los
entries->mtsofficialpack.pzlp11.descript: The PZL P11.c is a born and bred fighter aircraft. Its shoulder wing monoplane configuration provides the pilot with exceptional visibility of the sky and ground, and makes the PZL P11.c much faster than it's biplane fighter counterparts.
entries->mtsofficialpack.pzlp11.name: Gray PZL P11.c
entries->mtsofficialpack.pzlp11_tan.name: Tan PZL P11.c
entries->mtsofficialpack.quad.descriptio: The Quad is a small all terrain vehicle, designed for one rider and a small amount of cargo. Due to its small size, it does not require assembly. Pop it down and ride away!

entries->mtsofficialpack.repairkit.descr: This repair kit can aid in restoring a totaled vehicle! However, due to its specialized equipment, it is unsuited for regular repair jobs.

entries->mtsofficialpack.scout.descripti: The International Harvester Scout is an offroad two door SUV made from 1961-1980. This SUV, the Scout II, was produced from 1971-1980. It seats two, with area for cargo in the back.

This bed allows for extra cargo, be it crates filled with beer and traffic cones or just some unlucky sheep you chose to pick up for your questionable piston contraption. Uninstall it to make room for an entire gun turret!
entries->mtsofficialpack.scouthardtop.de: A proper roof for your car! Looks classy and keeps your head from getting wet.
entries->mtsofficialpack.scoutpickuproof: For that outback look, choose the pickup roof. Makes your car extra american.

entries->mtsofficialpack.seat.descriptio: A somewhat comfortable and cheap seat designed primarily for aircraft. If you're broke or dont care about looks you can also mount them on cars.
entries->mtsofficialpack.seat_harness.de: A harness that safely straps you (or any unfortunate farm animal) in and gets lifted by the Bell 206 Hoist. Thy balls be squeezeth.

entries->mtsofficialpack.skyhawk.descrip: The Skyhawk is the MC-172s successor, being more comfortable, faster and less splinter inducing, all whilst being just as maneuverable and easy to fly as its wooden counterpart. A perfect sequel to your flight journey!
It also reeks of expired butter. Disgusting!
entries->mtsofficialpack.smallarmscartri: A handfull of empty small arms casings.
entries->mtsofficialpack.smokecan_blue.d: A canister containing chemicals that produce a colorful smoke trail when flying!
A canister containing chemicals that produce a colorful smoke trail when flying!
entries->mtsofficialpack.smokecan_polych: This special canister lets you recreate a certain internet meme from 2011!
entries->mtsofficialpack.smokecan_red.de: A canister containing chemicals that produce a colorful smoke trail when flying!
A canister that produces a boring white chemtrail when flying.
entries->mtsofficialpack.snail_sculpture: An abstract sculpture molded from clay, representing a snail and her child. Gifted by an anonymus supporter.

entries->mtsofficialpack.spotlight.descr: With this oversized flashlight, SnailDynamics ensures high performance conical photon distribution even on the darkest of nights. This powerful beam marks and lights up any airborne target for your AA gunners to take care of.
entries->mtsofficialpack.spotlight.name: Spotlight
entries->mtsofficialpack.spotlight_bell2: A smaller version of the Snail Dynamics Spotlight, designed to be mounted to lighter airframes. Point out baddies in style!

For testing purposes. And destruction. And bombs. Lots of bombs.
entries->mtsofficialpack.trafficcone.des: Its a goddamn traffic cone, what do you want me to write here. It cones traffic!
entries->mtsofficialpack.trimotor.descri: The Ford Trimotor is an old, yet trustworthy aircraft.  Its large wingspan provides ample lift for short takeoffs, as well as enough to maintain flight with one engine out.  With room for 12 passengers or crates, it's a great choice for long-haul flights where reliability (but not time) is of the essence.
entries->mtsofficialpack.vulcanair.descr: The Vulcanair is a versitile six-seat, twin-engined, high-wing monoplane aircraft. Its spacious hull can be fitted with plenty of cargo or passagners. It can equip additional fuel tanks or even an onboard camera for aerial surveillence!
entries->mtsofficialpack.watercannon.des: In its base principle, a big pump with a tube, shooting a high pressure stream of water. Ready to be used against large fires. Or protesters.
entries->mtsofficialpack.watercannon_pro: Heavy, big tank full of water, used by the watercannon.

entries->mtsofficialpack.wheellarge.name: Large Wheel
